---
name: Worker idea
about: Propose a BFrost worker or built-in automation
title: "[Worker idea] "
labels: worker, enhancement
---

## What should the worker do?

Describe the workflow and who would use it.

## Inputs

List credentials, local dependencies, files, queues, or settings the worker would need.

## Outputs

List jobs, notes, queue changes, posts, files, or events the worker would produce.

## Dashboard controls

Describe the settings, health checks, and routes that should appear in the dashboard.

## Safety notes

Mention any privacy, credential, filesystem, or network risks.
